title: phyllanthus distichus
intro: Phyllanthus distichus, also known as the green fruit or green seed plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus distichus include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus distichus is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
